# Canyon State Enterprises

> Multi-trade construction company serving Arizona, Nevada, Utah, and New Mexico. Canyon State self-performs 12 trades in-house — roofing, stucco/EIFS, HVAC, plumbing, masonry, metals, fencing, gutters, general contracting, residential and commercial construction, and land development — with 25+ years of work across the Southwest. Corporate headquarters in Kingman, AZ, with offices in Phoenix, Bullhead City, Lake Havasu City, and Las Vegas.

Arizona ROC License #353683 (current). Canyon State Heating & Cooling: ROC #328713. The original Arizona ROC License #074485 was issued December 1987 to A-2-Z Roofing Supply Co., the predecessor that merged into Canyon State in 2020. Fully bonded and insured (general liability and workers' compensation).

Key differentiator: Canyon State self-performs every trade it sells. No layered subcontractors — one crew structure, one schedule, one accountable team per job.

## Trades & Services

- [Roofing](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/roofing): TPO, PVC, EPDM, tile, metal, asphalt shingle, foam, and restoration coatings. Commercial and residential.
- [Stucco & EIFS](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/stucco): Three-coat stucco, synthetic stucco, and EIFS systems for residential and commercial.
- [General Contracting](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/general-contracting): New construction, renovations, and tenant improvements.
- [HVAC](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/hvac): Heating and cooling install, replacement, and service (Canyon State Heating & Cooling, ROC #328713).
- [Plumbing](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/plumbing): Residential and commercial plumbing across Mohave County.
- [Residential Construction](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/res-const): Custom homes, multi-family, and community developments.
- [Commercial Construction](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/com-const): Retail, hospitality, medical, dealership, and government.
- [Specialty Metals](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/metals): Standing seam, flush panel, custom flashings, and coping.
- [Masonry](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/masonry): Block, brick, and stone veneer.
- [Fencing](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/fencing): CMU, decorative, and perimeter fencing.
- [Seamless Gutters](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/gutters): Custom-fabricated gutters and downspouts.
- [Land Development](https://canyonstateaz.com/services/land-dev): Site prep, grading, and infrastructure.

## Offices & Service Areas

- [Kingman, AZ (Corporate HQ)](https://canyonstateaz.com/locations/kingman-az): 2959 Rhoades Ave, Kingman, AZ 86409. Phone (928) 757-9003. Serves Northwest Arizona — Mohave County, Golden Valley, the Bullhead City corridor.
- [Phoenix, AZ](https://canyonstateaz.com/locations/phoenix-az): Phone (602) 527-6050. Serves Greater Phoenix Metro — East Valley, West Valley, Scottsdale, Tempe, Mesa, Gilbert, Chandler.
- [Bullhead City, AZ](https://canyonstateaz.com/locations/bullhead-city-az): Serves the Tri-State Area — Western AZ, Southern NV, Eastern CA, including the Laughlin corridor and Fort Mohave.
- [Lake Havasu City, AZ](https://canyonstateaz.com/locations/lake-havasu-city-az): Serves Western Arizona — Lake Havasu, Parker, Quartzsite, and the Blythe area.
- [Las Vegas, NV](https://canyonstateaz.com/locations/las-vegas-nv): Phone (702) 659-2819. Serves Southern Nevada — Las Vegas, Henderson, North Las Vegas, Pahrump, Mesquite.

Active in Arizona, Nevada, Utah, and New Mexico. Past project history extends into Texas, California, North Carolina, Tennessee, and Colorado.

## Featured Work

- [Betty's Village North](https://canyonstateaz.com/blog/building-bettys-village-north-opportunity-village): Canyon State is the roofing, stucco, and metals contractor on Opportunity Village's residential community for adults with intellectual disabilities in northwest Las Vegas — 22 residential dwellings and 3 commercial buildings, targeting late-2026 completion. General contractor: R&O Construction.
- [Commercial Portfolio](https://canyonstateaz.com/portfolio/commercial): Medical, hospitality, dealership, government, multi-family, and retail projects across the Southwest.
- [Residential Portfolio](https://canyonstateaz.com/portfolio/residential): Custom homes, model homes, and community developments.

## Company

- [About Canyon State](https://canyonstateaz.com/about): Company history, leadership, and the A-2-Z Roofing lineage dating to 1987.
- [Where We Work](https://canyonstateaz.com/where): Full coverage map across Arizona, Nevada, and the Southwest.
- [Partnerships](https://canyonstateaz.com/partnerships): Manufacturer partners (GAF, CertainTeed, Carlisle, Firestone, Versico, Eagle Roofing, MBCI, Petersen Aluminum, Mule Hide, Karnak, Dryvit, Omega Flex) and general-contractor clients (AR Mays, Lusardi, Willmeng, Kitchell, Path Construction, Pacificap, Overland, Wadman, EOS Fitness, Salad and Go, Home Depot, Opportunity Village).
- [Careers](https://canyonstateaz.com/careers): Open roles and trades hiring across all five offices.
- [Insights / Blog](https://canyonstateaz.com/blog): Project spotlights and construction articles.
